title: taraxacum cylleneum
intro: Taraxacum cylleneum, also known as the Cretan dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the mountains of Crete. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum cylleneum are numerous, with reported uses in treating digestive issues, reducing blood pressure, and supporting immune function. Taraxacum cylleneum is often prepared as a tea or infusion, with some herbalists also using it in tinctures and capsules for its medicinal properties.
